title: Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) Protocol
description: This document describes the Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) protocol, including its architecture, packet structure, and security features.

title: IPMI 2.0 Specification
description: The IPMI 2.0 specification outlines the Intelligent Platform Management Interface version 2.0, which is a standard for managing computer systems remotely.

description: This Telnet client configuration TCL script sets up and configures a Telnet session with a remote device.
